name: Scan receipt images in Google Drive with Gemini AI and log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### How it works
Drop a receipt photo or PDF into your Google Drive folder — this workflow takes it from there. It grabs the new file, sends it to Gemini AI to read the receipt, and pulls out the important bits: date, store name, amount, tax, how you paid, and what kind of expense it is. All that gets added to your spreadsheet automatically, and the receipt moves to a "processed" folder so you don't scan it twice. If you dropped in a bunch of receipts at once, it works through them one by one.

### Setup steps
1. Make two Drive folders: one for new receipts, one for processed ones
2. Create a spreadsheet with columns: date, store_name, total_amount, tax_amount, payment_method, category, source_file, original_file_id
3. Get a Gemini API key from Google AI Studio and add it in n8n Settings → Variables as `GEMINI_API_KEY`
4. Connect your Google Drive and Sheets OAuth2 credentials
5. Set your folder IDs in Watch Drive Folder, Check Remaining Files, and Move to Processed
6. Set the spreadsheet ID in Append to Sheet

### Customization
- Change what gets extracted by editing the prompt in Gemini OCR
- Adjust polling frequency in Watch Drive Folder
- Update expense categories to match your books

## Trigger & filter
Polls your Drive folder every minute. Only images and PDFs get through — everything else is ignored.

## OCR processing
Downloads the receipt, converts it for Gemini, and parses the structured data that comes back.

## Save results
Adds a new row to your spreadsheet and moves the receipt to the processed folder.

## Batch loop
Checks if there are more receipts waiting. If so, waits 30 seconds then grabs the next one.
